name: Claude
description: Installs the private compusib.settings-bridge VS Code extension in place (from a local working tree when available, otherwise a sparse checkout of compusib/ai at the same canonical path — never copied) and provisions Claude data sync (~/.claude to Backblaze B2 via rcloneops) on attach.

installSettingsBridge.description: Install the compusib.settings-bridge VS Code extension.

skipInstallSystemPackages.description: Skip the fallback installation of system packages (rclone, gh) the feature relies on. Set to true when those packages are baked into your devcontainer's Dockerfile so the feature does not try to install them at build time.

settingsBridgeRepoPath.description: Canonical path of the compusib/ai working tree, which is also exactly the path customizations.vscode.extensions points into. If it already holds the built vsix (bind-mounted working tree, or a prior checkout) the extension installs from it in place. If the path does not exist, the feature sparse-checks-out settingsBridgeRepo here. An existing repo without the vsix is left untouched (never cloned over).

settingsBridgeRepo.description: Git URL sparse-checked-out into settingsBridgeRepoPath when that path does not yet exist. SSH form by default (relies on the forwarded SSH agent, which is present at onCreate).

settingsBridgeRef.description: Git ref (branch/tag) to check out when fetching the vsix.

settingsBridgeVsixDir.description: Directory holding the built compusib.settings-bridge.vsix, relative to settingsBridgeRepoPath. The customizations.vscode.extensions entry is <settingsBridgeRepoPath>/<settingsBridgeVsixDir>/compusib.settings-bridge.vsix (a stable, version-less filename).

claudePlugins.description: Space-separated Claude Code plugins (each <name>@<marketplace>) every container using this feature should have installed from pluginMarketplace. Installed at each Claude session launch by claude-process-wrapper (set as claudeCode.claudeProcessWrapper) via 'claude plugin install', which also pulls each plugin's full dependency closure. Defaults to the compusib baseline; override per devcontainer, or set to empty to install none.

defaultPluginConfigs.description: Before installing each plugin, seed its userConfig defaults (declared in the plugin manifest) into ~/.claude/settings.json, using the bash repo's 'manifest-to-default-user-config' (resolved via BASH_REPO_ROOT). Best-effort and idempotent: fill-only (never overwrites a value you have already set), skips plugins that declare no defaults, and silently no-ops when the helper or a manifest is unavailable. Set false to skip default seeding.

pluginMarketplace.description: Online (git) source for the compusib Claude Code plugin marketplace. Registered at session launch by claude-process-wrapper via 'claude plugin marketplace add'; used unless pluginMarketplaceLocalOverride names a mounted local checkout. SSH form by default (relies on SSH-agent forwarding).

pluginMarketplaceLocalOverride.description: Directory that, when present and containing .claude-plugin/marketplace.json, makes the feature register the compusib marketplace as a local 'directory' source pointing at it (instead of the online pluginMarketplace git source). Re-evaluated on every container start; set to empty to always use the online source.

bootstrapClaudeSync.description: Run 'rcloneops claude-bootstrap' on attach to establish the ~/.claude bisync baseline against Backblaze B2. (The session-sync hooks ship in the rclone Claude Code plugin, enabled declaratively via claudePlugins — not installed here.) Requires rcloneops on PATH (from the bashrc feature) and the DEVCONTAINERS_B2_* credentials in the env; cleanly no-ops otherwise. Set false to disable entirely.
